greeting.speaker: Earl
greeting.text: Cid. Good. I was hoping to catch you before it got too late.

whats_going_on.speaker: Earl
whats_going_on.text: That man from this morning. He's still in town. That's not normal.

worried.speaker: Earl
worried.text: I'm careful. There's a difference. That man is still in town.

long_day.speaker: Earl
long_day.text: About to get longer. That suited fellow hasn't left.

warning.speaker: Earl
warning.text: I need you to listen to me very carefully. Do you trust me?

trust_yes.speaker: Earl
trust_yes.text: Good. Then hear me out. Some people come to places like this looking for something specific. Something they lost track of.

trust_deflect.speaker: Earl
trust_deflect.text: It's about you, son. More than you know.

trust_question.speaker: Earl
trust_question.text: That's a fair question. And the honest answer is yes. More than most people here.

reveal.speaker: Earl
reveal.text: You came to this town for a reason, Cid. You just don't remember what it was.

deny.speaker: Earl
deny.text: I know it sounds strange. But that man in the suit isn't here for coffee.

work.speaker: Earl
work.text: That's what you were told. There's a difference.

feeling.speaker: Earl
feeling.text: I know. That's why I'm talking to you now and not tomorrow.

escape_offer.speaker: Earl
escape_offer.text: If you want answers, find Frank tonight. He's been where you are. He'll tell you what I can't.

choices.text: I think you've lost it Earl.

find_frank.speaker: Earl
find_frank.text: Good. And Cid. Don't let that man run any more tests on you. Whatever he calls them.

dismiss.speaker: Earl
dismiss.text: Maybe so. Just... be careful tonight. That's all.

dont.speaker: Earl
dont.text: Then tomorrow you might not be asking questions anymore.

farewell.speaker: Earl
farewell.text: Go on now. I'll keep watch from here.

greeting_return.speaker: Earl
greeting_return.text: You remember what I said. That's all I ask.
